creator: zenaf@noos.fr
text:
FBSD-62. This prerelase of 6.3 Kernel works on my P5LD2 ASUS motherboard.
Contents of /boot/loader.conf:
hw.ata.ata_dma=1
hw.ata.atapi_dma=0
hint.apic.0.disabled="1"
userconfig_script_load="YES"
snd_hda_load="YES"
if_msk_load="YES"


msk0: <Marvell Technology Group Ltd. Yukon EC Id 0xb6 Rev 0x02> on mskc0
msk0: Ethernet address: 00:17:31:b1:b6:4d
miibus0: <MII bus> on msk0
e1000phy0: <Marvell 88E1111 Gigabit PHY> on miibus0
e1000phy0:  10baseT, 10baseT-FDX, 100baseTX, 100baseTX-FDX, 1000baseTX-FDX, auto
mskc0: [FAST]

pcm0: <HDA Codec: Realtek ALC882>
pcm0: <HDA Driver Revision: 20071020_0048>


The Yukon Marvel 88E53 gigabit ethernet card runs without problems since more than one month.

The sound chips works, but the sound is not very clear.

In fact, bravo.

I don't know who I could contact.

Yous  sincerely.

Jean-Christophe CAZENAVE
